Meme Coin Scam Detector

Analyze any token contract to detect potential scams, honeypots, and security risks.

Enter the contract address of any ERC20 token on Ethereum or BSC

What We Check

Contract Code

Analyzes contract code for suspicious functions and security risks

Ownership Control

Detects centralized control and risky admin privileges

Liquidity Analysis

Checks for sufficient liquidity and locked/unlocked status

Honeypot Detection

Simulates transactions to detect sell restrictions

Disclaimer

This tool provides analysis based on available on-chain data and common patterns. It cannot detect all possible scams or risks. Always do your own research before investing.

Crypto investments carry high risk. Only invest what you can afford to lose.

Meme Coin Scam Detector | Disclaimer: Not financial advice. Always do your own research.
